name: NXT Energy Solutions Inc.
business: NXT provides airborne survey services using its proprietary Stress Field Detection (SFD) technology to identify oil and gas prospects. The company plans to earn fees from conducting surveys for oil and gas industry clients, and may also receive royalties from successful prospects.

exposures.sentence: NXT utilizes an airborne SFD Survey System invented by George Liszicasz, our CEO, President and largest shareholder.
